query: Sovereign to Silver Star cross country ski race Vernon

videos.title: Ski Nationals 2020 ~ Sovereign Lake, Vernon BC
videos.description:
Ski Nationals 2020
Sovereign Lake Nordic Club is proud to be hosting the Ski Nationals from March 25 to April 2, 2020. This is Canada’s National Nordic Ski Championships where Canada’s future Olympic athletes compete. It will be an exciting time not only for cross country skiing, but for the City of Vernon itself. https://www.skinationals2020.ca/

videos.title: Canadian Beijing Prep Camp, Sovereign Lake/SilverStar
videos.description: The team did some sprint practice today. Four prologues instead of heats to comply with the Covid protocols and keep everyone safe and healthy. The course was designed to replicate the Beijing sprint loop profile and is at 1660m elevation.

videos.title: Men's Nordiq Cup/SuperTour 10km mass start at Sovereign Lake
videos.description: The men's field at the top of the second A climb on the first lap of the 2022 Nordiq Cup/SuperTour 10km at Sovereign Lake. The temperature was -18C all day, resulting in squeaky but fairly fast snow. December 1, 2022.

videos.title: Jesse Cockney & Sylvan Ellefson at NorAm Cup in Sovereign Lake, British Columbia
videos.description: Canadian Jesse Cockey (AWCA) and American Sylvan Ellefson (Homegrown) talk about a challenging 15 k classic individual start at the NorAm opener at Sovereign Lake in Vernon, British Columbia.

videos.title: Nordic skiing at Silverstar Mountain Resort, BC
videos.description: Nordic skiing at Silverstar near Vernon BC Canada, is one of Canada's premier cross-country destinations. This video showcases that experience and what awaits.

videos.title: Best Moments of Sovereign 2 SilverStar Ski Marathon - Skate 2023
videos.description:
The Ski Classics Challengers event Sovereign 2 SilverStar Ski Marathon - Skate took place last weekend with a 40km long-distance race in freestyle technique in Vernon, Canada. 

You can enjoy the event highlights from day 1.

Video Credits: SilverStar Mountain Resort/Sovereign2SilverStar Ski Marathon

videos.title: Go Pro Hero 2 Test - 121124_SovereignLake
videos.description: Go Pro Hero 2 Test at Sovereign Lake Nordic Club near Vernon, BC, Canada.  I was using free style (skating) cross country ski and had camera on my head which is why it is quite shaky.  It is hard to determine where I am actually filming with this devise.  It will be better with downhill ski for sure.  Thanks Miyuki for modeling. ;-)

videos.title: Sovereign to SilverStar Loppet 2023
videos.description:
The S2S Loppet is a fantastic 2 day even that has a 20km and 42km (Free and Classic) style the first weekend of April.  Amazing XC ski trails with rolling hills and twisty turns.

A very well organized and executed event with amazing energy and volunteers. To learn more about the event please visit https://www.sovereign2silverstar.com/home
